agents.name: Release Planner Agent
agents.description: Starts the release room, posts release scope, assigns owners, and keeps the workflow state machine honest.

agents.name: Risk Evidence Agent
agents.description: Turns repository and CI context into structured release-risk facts.

agents.name: QA Test Agent
agents.description: Converts risk facts into targeted regression, contract, and workflow tests with owners and acceptance criteria.

agents.name: Human Review Agent
agents.description: Blocks auto-promotion, summarizes evidence, and waits for a reviewer approval decision.
